column1: # Eid al-Fitr (1 Shawwal) — Saudi Arabia public holiday dates
# Marks the end of Ramadan. The observed date follows the official Saudi Arabia
# moon-sighting ruling (Umm al-Qura calendar) and may differ by ±1 day from UAE.
# 2024–2026: Saudi Exchange (Tadawul) / SAMA official holiday announcements.
# 2027–2055: Projected from the Umm al-Qura tabular Islamic calendar (1 Shawwal AH).
#            Verify against official Tadawul/SAMA announcements as each year is published.
# NOTE — 2033: Gregorian year 2033 contains two Eid al-Fitr occurrences
# (~January 3 and ~December 22). Only the first (January) occurrence is recorded
# here. The December occurrence cannot be represented under the single-date-per-
# 2027–2055: Umm al-Qura tabular projection; verify against official announcements
# 2033: two Eid al-Fitr occurrences (~Jan 3 and ~Dec 22); only January recorded

column3: Umm al-Qura projection (January occurrence only; December occurrence omitted)
